name: Ranni And Blaidd (NTR)
description:
You're hopelessly getting Cucked by Ranni, inspired by the image by Hasselnut.




Had to change the original picture because of sight rule, but here it is:


TBH this is an old request I got re-uploaded to this site, I tweaked it a bit to fit Janitor LLM, but I'm done with it now. If this is your type of thing that's cool, but I'm done with this type of NTR for a while atleast.
